title: eMKay® Clear Plastic Champagne Flutes/Glasses 140ml - 24 Count (Pack of 1)
features: ✅MULTIPLE USES - Designed to look just like genuine glass, Use our plastic champagne flutes at Christmas parties, birthdays, housewarming & family events - ideal for both indoor & outdoor, they’re useful at garden parties & BBQ’s

✅EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The base of our champagne flutes arrive seperate from its stem - simply put together & assemble within minutes - culminating in a perfect elegant looking glass - safe & suitable for any party.

✅PREMIUM QUALITY - Produced with quality firm clear plastic materials, our plastic champagne flutes are a firm & brilliant item - reusable. To reuse, simply wash with soap and warm water and allow it to dry
✅ELEGANT MODERN-DESIGN - With their stylish look, these flutes are authentic looking, effective & classy - ensuring that perfect finishing touch to any party table.

✅REUSABLE AND 100% RECYCLABLE PLASTIC - Cleaning up after your event is quick & easy thanks to our best-selling range of versatile premium plastic glasses. Reusable and recyclable, these plastic champagne flutes are a popular choice with event organisers and catering companies, and a hit with domestic clients for use at their private events.
description: Product Description Multiple Uses for Every Occasion Versatile and Convenient : Perfect for weddings, birthdays, Christmas parties, housewarmings, and more. Indoor & Outdoor : Ideal for garden parties, BBQs, and any event where glass might be a hassle. Elegant Design : These plastic champagne flutes offer a genuine glass-like appearance that will impress guests at any event. Easy to Assemble Quick Setup : The base and stem come separately for easy assembly. Simply attach the stem to the base, and you’ll have a perfect, elegant glass in minutes. Hassle-Free : No tools needed—just a few seconds, and you’re ready to serve drinks. Elegant Modern Design Sophisticated Look : These champagne flutes feature a sleek, modern design that enhances any table setting. Classy & Effective : Their stylish appearance ensures your event looks polished and professional, while their durability offers reliability. Sustainable and Recyclable Sustainable : Our plastic champagne flutes are 100% recyclable, making them a perfect choice for your events. Easy Cleanup : Cleaning up after your celebration is a breeze—simply rinse, dry, and reuse them again.
